messages.text:
Hello! I'm ENGIE, your project management and development assistant. I can help you with task management, code analysis, and project optimization. What would you like to work on today?

I can assist you with:
- Managing your development tasks
- Analyzing code and identifying patterns 
- Setting up project templates
- Monitoring Git repositories
- Providing project insights and suggestions

What area would you like to focus on?
